introduction: In today's world, sometimes legit businesses need side hustles to stay alive. Veteran biker Choppa calls his loyal pal Technical to form an underground alliance. Choppa orchestrates a series of attacks for his own personal gain. When a few members of the alliance realize that they're not gaining equally from this network, conflicts arise. There's a variety of wise guys you can choose from; it's not always about who you can trust, but the person with the right energy.
